scripts.dev: node scripts/dev_env.js && vue-tsc --noEmit -p app/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n h5,mp,server "cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build --watch --config app/vite.config.ts" "cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build -p mp-weixin --watch --config app/vite.config.ts" "tsx server/src/server.ts"
scripts.build: vue-tsc --noEmit -p app/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n h5,mp "cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build --mode production --config app/vite.config.ts" "cross-env UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build -p mp-weixin --mode production --config app/vite.config.ts"
